_README: Trimmed cell extracted from the May-2026 typelessform.com dogfood run (aeo-responses/2026-05-13/_summary.json). Q2 = 'voice form filling solution for e-commerce checkout', engine = Gemini. gpt-5.4-mini wrongly classified retailers-mentioned-as-customers (Amazon, Walmart, Starbucks) as competitors; gemini-2.5-flash correctly returned empty. Cross-check splits them into competitorsUnverified as designed. Renderer must NOT promote this cell to a bold-red 'Pitch <site> to add typelessform alongside Amazon' action in Actionable Gaps. See the BUG: Render-tier downgrade for unverified competitors fix.
